## Summary

Describe the project, curriculum or app change.

## Why

Explain how this improves Virtual Terminal School for students, schools, CTF partners or Apple developers.

## Safety

Confirm that the change stays inside simulated lab scope and does not introduce real-world offensive capability.

## Validation

- [ ] Swift parse/build checked where possible
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] Presentation or partner material updated when needed
- [ ] No unofficial partner logo or brand asset added
